narrative:
Twinsburg 1-B (precinct in Summit County) has 880 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.0 percentage points.
